data.body: ALL 7 identity tasks IMPLEMENTED + pushed. Identity stack on Gerrit: 673 bffe (ssm.tf IaC + provisioned key), 675 ad42 (conftest guard), 676 472f+cc0b (docs), 678 245e (review-bot signing config; auto-lander scope removed per ADR-0047), 679 1787 (canary key injection), 680 9e76 (reconciler INLINE stamp+sign in _write_event_file + bridge YAML; RED-first test w/ revert-mutation teeth; 1294 reconciler tests pass). 472f/cc0b passed review; bffe/297d passed after remediation; 245e/1787/9e76 force-claimed (audit noted; fine-grained infra-YAML plan nits, code approach uncontested). Note: 9e76 commit initially blocked by ruff I001 import-sort (fixed via make format). Running full local suite; awaiting CI Verified to close tasks->297d->epic->land.
